name: Caramel Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. On a jelly roll pan, line with whole graham crackers.
2. Melt together butter and margarine in a saucepan over medium heat.
3. Add brown sugar and boil for 2 minutes, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
4. Remove from heat and stir in nuts until evenly distributed.
5. Pour the mixture over the lined graham crackers.
6. Sprinkle chocolate chips evenly over the top.
7. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 10 minutes or until set.
8. Allow to cool completely before cutting into squares.
9. Store leftovers in an airtight container; freezes well.
